data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 3/28 (Tue), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your student's skill!

🗓️Period: 3/28 (Tue) After Maintenance – 4/3 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
